summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of TrendScout automation platform. All core automation features are working correctly including admin automation page, trend alerts system, and product import pipeline.

integration_issues.issue: Import results section may not always display processed data immediately after CSV import
integration_issues.workaround: Results are processed correctly in the background, UI feedback could be improved

passed_tests: Admin Automation page loads with all 4 quick action cards (Run Scoring, AI Summaries, Generate Alerts, Import Products)
Generate Alerts button successfully creates alerts for high-opportunity products
Manual entry form displays all required product fields and submits successfully
CSV Import tab shows file upload area and paste functionality
Automation Pipeline tab displays all 5 automation steps with individual run buttons
Trend Alerts page displays stats cards (Total, Unread, Critical, Early Stage)
Alert cards show proper content: title, body, priority badge, type badge, trend score
Dismiss button successfully removes alerts from the list
Mark All Read button updates all alert statuses
Filter dropdown allows filtering by All Alerts, Unread, Critical, High Priority
Sidebar navigation shows Trend Alerts with unread badge count
Sidebar displays Elite section and Admin section with proper access
Demo mode localStorage integration works correctly for alerts storage
Product automation pipeline calculates trend scores, opportunity ratings, and stages automatically
